caption: A 48-soldier Spearmen line, ordered 200 units due right of its facing -- too far to side-step, but not a rear move. It quarter-turns in place toward the destination's side, then marches straight there keeping its pre-turn footprint the whole way (the wide line stays wide -- it never reforms to face the new heading), and finally quarter-turns back to its original facing on arrival. A file march, not a repointed unit.
